title: Should I Claim My Parent as a Dependent?
summary: Walks through the IRS tests for claiming a parent as a dependent and gives a plain-language likely answer — not a tax filing.
grossIncomeLimitHint: This limit changes most years — check the current year's IRS gross income limit for a qualifying relative before relying on this number.

sources.name: IRS: May I claim my parent as a dependent?

disclaimer: This is a simplified, plain-language walkthrough of the general rules — not a substitute for the IRS's own interactive interview tool or advice from a tax professional. Your specific situation (multiple support providers, a multiple support agreement, a parent's marital status, and more) can change the answer.
